teachings.title: Core Teachings
teachings.subtitle: Daily reminders drawn from Swami Ji's spiritual emphasis.
teachings.oneBody: Self-restraint, steadiness, and purity of intention prepare the seeker for lasting peace.
teachings.twoBody: Scriptural insight becomes meaningful only when it brings humility, clarity, and right action.
teachings.threeBody: When service is offered without ego, compassion itself becomes a form of worship.

home.initiativesSubtitle: Areas of service and outreach reflected across the wider mission.

initiatives.one: Spiritual education, satsang, and scripture-based guidance for seekers.
initiatives.two: Humanitarian service supporting social upliftment, care, and relief work.
initiatives.three: Cultural, ecological, and community initiatives rooted in Sanatan values.

onboarding.welcomeTitle: Begin your spiritual journey with clarity
onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Daily Panchang, Swami Ji's schedule, wisdom content, seva opportunities, and Ashram updates in one calm place.
onboarding.footer: By continuing, you agree to receive a respectful and personalized spiritual experience from AvdheshanandG Mission.

slides.panchangTitle: Begin each day with Panchang and sacred timing

slides.scheduleTitle: Follow Swami Ji's latest schedule and darshan updates

slides.wisdomTitle: Read, watch, and reflect with Swami Ji's teachings
slides.wisdomDescription: Access articles, books, podcasts, and video series curated for your daily sadhana.
slides.sevaTitle: Support seva, volunteer, and stay part of the mission
slides.sevaDescription: Donate securely, explore Ashram initiatives, and stay close to the work that matters.

appDrawer.title: Mission Guide

appDrawer.footerText: The mobile app now mirrors more of the website's trust and context layer so devotees can understand the mission, not just consume content.

aboutSwami.title: About Swami Ji
aboutSwami.subtitle: A life rooted in tapasya, lineage, service, and compassionate spiritual leadership.
aboutSwami.heroTitle: A modern spiritual guide anchored in an ancient tradition
aboutSwami.heroText: Swami Avdheshanand Giri Ji Maharaj represents a living continuity of Vedantic wisdom, disciplined sadhana, and selfless service. His journey unites renunciation, scriptural depth, and active care for society.
aboutSwami.biographySubtitle: Key moments that shaped his spiritual path and responsibility toward the world.

early.title: Early Spiritual Inclination
early.description: From a young age, Swami Ji displayed unusual inwardness, discipline, and attraction toward spiritual life.

himalaya.title: Journey to the Himalayas
himalaya.description: He embraced tapasya, contemplation, and scriptural study in search of truth beyond worldly comfort.

lineage.title: Sannyas and Lineage
lineage.description: He received Sannyas Diksha within the sacred Juna Akhara tradition and emerged as a respected spiritual leader.

global.title: Global Spiritual Leadership
global.description: Today he continues to guide seekers in India and abroad through wisdom, compassion, and grounded action.

aboutSwami.recognitionsSubtitle: A few markers of the wider respect Swami Ji has earned across spiritual and public life.

recognitions.one: Recognized globally for advancing Sanatan Dharma with clarity and compassion.
recognitions.two: Honoured for contributions to spiritual literature, discourse, and public thought.
recognitions.three: Respected across Akharas, institutions, and communities for principled leadership.
recognitions.four: Known for integrating scriptural wisdom with seva, education, and social upliftment.

aboutSwami.thoughtsSubtitle: Themes that return again and again in Swami Ji's message to seekers.

thoughts.one: We are like waves longing to merge back into the ocean of the Divine.
thoughts.two: Discipline, restraint, and humility open the way to genuine peace.
thoughts.three: Through seva, remembrance, and right living, the divine becomes visible in all.

missionScreen.title: Mission & Teachings
missionScreen.subtitle: A wider look at the vision, values, and service-oriented expression of the mission.
missionScreen.teachingsSubtitle: How the mission translates wisdom into lived guidance.

one.title: Vedantic Insight
one.description: Teachings return to oneness, self-awareness, disciplined living, and devotion rooted in direct experience.

two.title: Meditative Practice
two.description: Silence, mantra, prayer, and contemplative discipline are offered as practical ways to deepen inner life.

three.title: Seva & Responsibility
three.description: The mission treats selfless service as a natural expression of spiritual maturity and compassion.

missionScreen.initiativesSubtitle: Work that carries the mission into society.

initiatives.one: Spiritual discourses, satsang, and guidance for seekers across age groups.
initiatives.two: Social upliftment through educational, humanitarian, and community-facing outreach.
initiatives.three: Support for values-based living through books, media, and spiritual programming.
initiatives.four: Encouragement of ecological awareness, dharmic culture, and compassionate service.

missionScreen.presenceSubtitle: The mission's presence continues to reach devotees through travel, programs, and digital platforms.

presence.one: Major ashram activity centered around Haridwar and connected spiritual locations.
presence.two: Regular outreach through events, talks, and media that reach devotees across India.
presence.three: A growing digital presence through articles, books, videos, live sessions, and mission updates.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How platform information is collected, protected, and used across the mission's digital products.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.body: We collect information you provide directly, including contact details, registrations, volunteer submissions, and donation details required to process your requests securely.

use.title: How We Use Information
use.body: We use your information to manage services, communicate updates, improve user experience, support mission operations, and maintain safety and fraud prevention controls.

share.title: Data Sharing
share.body: We do not sell personal information. Limited information may be shared with trusted providers for secure hosting, communications, payments, or analytics under appropriate safeguards.

choices.title: Your Choices
choices.body: You may request correction or deletion of personal data where legally permitted. For such requests, please contact the mission through the platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The operating terms and responsibilities for using AvdheshanandG Mission's digital platforms.

use.title: Use of Platform
use.body: By using the platform, you agree to use it lawfully, respectfully, and without attempting misuse, harmful disruption, or unauthorized access.

content.title: Content and Availability
content.body: We work to keep information accurate and services available, though features may evolve, pause, or change during maintenance or operational updates.

donations.title: Donations and Registrations
donations.body: Donation processing, registrations, and some connected services may involve third-party providers. Users are responsible for submitting accurate information and reviewing details before completion.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the extent permitted by law, the platform is provided as-is without guarantees of uninterrupted availability, and liability is limited for indirect or consequential loss.

mantraDikshaScreen.title: Mantra Diksha Registration
mantraDikshaScreen.subtitle: Understand the significance of the process and begin your registration guidance through the Ashram office.
mantraDikshaScreen.introTitle: A sacred commitment, not a casual form
mantraDikshaScreen.introText: Mantra Diksha is approached with reverence, preparedness, and inner sincerity. This screen is the beginning of your registration journey so the Ashram team can guide you appropriately.
mantraDikshaScreen.readinessSubtitle: A few expectations devotees should keep in heart before proceeding.

readiness.one: Approach the process with faith, humility, and seriousness of intention.
readiness.two: Be prepared to share identity details and supporting documents as required.
readiness.three: The final process may involve scheduling, review, and guidance from the Ashram side.
readiness.four: This path is meant for sincere seekers who are ready for discipline and practice.

mantraDikshaScreen.registrationSubtitle: How the mobile journey works right now.
mantraDikshaScreen.registrationText: The Ashram office will help guide the full registration process, document requirements, and next steps. Use the button below to start the conversation and receive direction for the formal application.
mantraDikshaScreen.contactSubtitle: Share your intention to begin the Mantra Diksha registration process. The Ashram office will guide the required steps and documentation.
mantraDikshaScreen.contactPlaceholder: Please share your intention, background, and any relevant details for Mantra Diksha registration...
